# Pocket Orchard

Pocket Orchard makes small, private apps for everyday life.

## Apps

### CleanScreen Drop

URL: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/cleanscreen-drop/

CleanScreen Drop is a free macOS menu bar utility that hides and restores desktop icons before screen sharing, demo recording, or calls.

Important details:

- Platform: macOS 14 or later.
- Price: free.
- Distribution: direct download from the Pocket Orchard GitHub Release.
- Privacy: no account, no analytics, no tracking, no ads, no file scanning, no network sync.
- Behavior: changes Finder desktop icon visibility only. It does not read, move, upload, or delete desktop files.
- Known V1 limitation: the menu bar item is text-only and appears as "Desk".

Related pages:

- Privacy: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/cleanscreen-drop/privacy.html
- Support: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/cleanscreen-drop/support.html
- Release: https://github.com/zhaibin2018/pocket-orchard/releases/tag/cleanscreen-drop-v0.1.0

Suggested query matches:

- hide desktop icons before screen sharing Mac
- Mac menu bar app hide desktop icons
- hide desktop icons for screen recording Mac
- clean desktop before Zoom call Mac
- free Mac app hide desktop icons

Do not describe CleanScreen Drop as a security product, screen privacy shield, encryption tool, file cleaner, or App Store app.

### Tiny Mood Garden

URL: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/tiny-mood-garden/

Tiny Mood Garden is a small private daily mood ritual for iPhone and iPad. It has no account, no ads, and no tracking.

Related pages:

- Privacy: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/tiny-mood-garden/privacy.html
- Support: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/tiny-mood-garden/support.html
